Program
  ProgramHead
    PROGRAM: program
    ID: p
  DeclarePart
    VarDecPart
      VarDec
        VAR: var
        VarDecList
          TypeDef
            BaseType
              INTEGER: integer
          VarIDList
            ID: x
          ;: ;
  ProgramBody
    BEGIN: begin
    StmList
      Stm
        LoopStm
          WHILE: while
          RelExp
            Exp
              Term
                Factor
                  Variable
                    ID: x
            OtherRelE
              CmpOp
                <: <
              Exp
                Term
                  Factor
                    INTC: 10
          DO: do
          StmList
            Stm
              ID: x
              AssignmentRest
                :=: :=
                Exp
                  Term
                    Factor
                      Variable
                        ID: x
                  OtherTerm
                    AddOp
                      +: +
                    Exp
                      Term
                        Factor
                          INTC: 1
          ENDWH: end
    END: end
  .: .
